questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if Hewitt and Nolan Meats are close competitors and there are not many alternatives, or if one is a major supplier to competitors of the other.

Provide your view on whether the Acquisition (in particular, Hewitt’s acquisition of Nolan Meats’ primary processing facility in Gympie) would limit the availability of primary processing services to be supplied on a contract basis, including organic processing, in the relevant region. If you consider such availability would be limited, provide your view on whether sufficient alternative suppliers of these services would remain after the Acquisition.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Hewitt and/or Nolan Meats.
